value.stringValue: Blue Arrow - Changes to your Rates
No Contacts to send Email to
No Job Roles against this Account

rules.name: Add_single_rate_for_current_job_role
rules.label: Add single rate for current job role

rules.name: Add_multiple_Rates_for_current_job_role
rules.label: Add multiple Rates for current job role

screens.name: Add_a_new_rate_line_screen
screens.label: Add a new rate line screen

fields.name: Add_a_new_rate_line_text
fields.fieldText: Would you like to add another Standard rate to this job role? If so, click on add Single rate. If not, then click next to start adding rates for your next job role.

screens.name: Add_a_new_rate_line_screen_0
screens.label: Add a new rate line screen

fields.name: Add_a_new_rate_line_text_0_0
fields.fieldText: Would you like to add another Single rate to this job role? If so, click on add standard rate. If not, then click next to start adding rates for your next job role.

fields.name: Add_a_new_rate_line_text_0
fields.fieldText: Would you like to add a Single Rate Line (Standard Rates Only) or Multiple Rate lines for this Job role? Please select what you need from the options below:

fields.name: Display5_0
fields.fieldText:
Please enter the charge rate for the job:

{!Selected_Job_Loop.Name}

fields.name: Add_note_for_the_above_rate_Single
fields.fieldText: Add note for the above rate

fields.name: Display7
fields.fieldText:
Confirmation

Please check the information is accurate below, if you no longer wish to send you can close this window


The following contacts will be emailed:

{!ContactText}


These are the Job Roles and Charge Rates they will be emailed:


{!SingleRateText}


{!RateText}

fields.name: Display1
fields.fieldText: This process will send your client an email confirming the charge rates changes provided for each Job Role.

fields.name: Display11
fields.fieldText: Please choose who you want to receive the Charge Rate change email

fields.name: Display11_0
fields.fieldText: Please choose which Job Roles will have the Charge Rates changed

fields.name: Display5
fields.fieldText:
Please enter the charge rate for the job:

{!Selected_Job_Loop.Name}

validationRule.errorMessage: This must be greater than 0
This must be greater than 0
This must be greater than 0
This must be greater than 0
This must be greater than 0

textTemplates.name: EmailBody
textTemplates.text:
Dear {!Individual_Client_Name},

Please see below a list of Job Roles with their agreed rates:

{!SingleRateText}


{!RateText}

Please note, if any of the above rates are blank, they have not been populated.


Please let me know if you have any questions.

{!$User.FirstName} {!$User.LastName}

{!$User.Title}

{!$UserRole.Name}

textTemplates.name: JobText
textTemplates.text:
Job Role: {!Selected_Job_Loop.Name}

Standard Charge Rate: {!Charge_Rate}

Notes For Standard Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate}

Overtime Charge Rate: {!Overtime_Charge_Rate}

Notes For Overtime Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate2}

Saturday Charge Rate: {!Saturday_Charge_Rate}

Notes For Saturday Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate3}

Sunday Charge Rate: {!Sunday_Rate_Charge}

Notes For Sunday Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate4}

Bank Holiday Charge Rate: {!Bank_Holiday_Charge_Rate}

Notes For Bank Holiday Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate5}

AWR Charge Rate: {!Post_AWR_Charge_Rate}

Notes For AWR Charge Rate: {!Note_for_above_rate6}

textTemplates.name: SingleJobText
textTemplates.text:
Job Role: {!Selected_Job_Loop.Name}

Standard Charge Rate: {!Charge_Rate_Single}

Notes For Standard Charge Rate: {!Add_note_for_the_above_rate_Single}
